things.name: Tanna Island & Mount Yasur Volcano
things.description: Walk to the rim of the world's most accessible active volcano and watch lava explosions

things.name: Blue Lagoon (Pele Island)
things.description: Swimming in the vivid blue freshwater natural pool on Pele Island

things.name: Efate Island Loop Drive
things.description: Rainforest, blue holes, waterfalls and traditional villages around the main island

things.name: Mele Cascades Waterfall
things.description: Tiered waterfall with swimming pools 10 minutes from Port Vila

things.name: National Museum of Vanuatu
things.description: Traditional culture of Vanuatu's 113 languages and kastom ceremonies

things.name: Hideaway Island Marine Sanctuary
things.description: Snorkelling over coral reefs accessible by a short boat ride - post underwater mail

things.name: Pentecost Island Land Diving (Naghol)
things.description: The original bungee jumping - men dive from wooden towers with vines tied to their ankles

things.name: Port Vila Central Market
things.description: Fresh tropical fruit, vegetables, handicrafts and the famous Vanuatu kava

things.name: Kava Ceremony
things.description: Drink nakamal kava - the mildly narcotic root drink central to Vanuatu culture

things.name: Mast Restaurant Sunset Dinner
things.description: Finest dining in Vanuatu with views over the Port Vila harbour and Efate
